description: Analyze real estate development feasibility in San Francisco using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/development_feasibility.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The analysis must identify parcels where current Floor Area Ratio (FAR) is less than 50% of the maximum allowed (max_far), with current FAR calculated as total building square footage divided by parcel area (converting shape_area from square meters to square feet). Required outputs include a summary of total and feasible parcels, a CSV of the top 100 parcels by unused capacity ratio (including parcel_id, current_density, max_allowed, and unused_capacity_ratio) saved to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/feasible_parcels.csv, and a bar chart of the unused capacity ratio distribution saved to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/feasibility_distribution.png.
